summary: UI Polish Testing - Completed testing of 5 UI polish features requested by Dipali. Fixed product card aspect ratio issue on ShopPage.jsx. All other features verified working correctly.

issues: Pillar hero parallax component (PillarHero.jsx) exists but /celebrate uses its own hero section. Parallax effect available but not utilized on this page.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider using PillarHero component on /celebrate page to enable parallax effect, or add parallax to the existing hero section
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage.jsx had duplicate ProductCard implementation that didn't include mobile aspect-ratio fix - now fixed
PillarHero.jsx parallax implementation is complete but /celebrate page doesn't use this component
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI polish features verified: (1) Product cards on /shop now have aspect-ratio 4/5 on mobile, (2) PillarHero has parallax ready, (3) ChatMessage bubbles have softer gradient styling, (4) NotificationsInbox read/unread has clear contrast with pink border, (5) Font sizes consistent across pages. ShopPage.jsx was fixed to include mobile aspect-ratio.

product_cards_mobile_aspect.details: Fixed ShopPage.jsx line 569 to use aspect-[4/5] sm:aspect-square
product_cards_mobile_aspect.verified: Computed aspect ratio shows 4 / 5 on mobile viewport

pillar_hero_parallax.details: PillarHero.jsx has parallax effect (lines 174-210) with scroll handler and CSS
pillar_hero_parallax.note: /celebrate page uses its own hero, not PillarHero component

mira_chat_bubbles_styling.details: ChatMessage.jsx (lines 309-318) has softer gradient with borderRadius 20px 20px 6px 20px

notification_inbox_read_unread.details: Unread: 3px pink border (rgb(236,72,153)), opacity 1, font-weight 600. Read: no border, opacity 0.8, font-weight 500
notification_inbox_read_unread.verified: Clear visual distinction between read/unread items

font_consistency.details: Consistent across /shop, /celebrate, /notifications: h1=28px, h2=22px, h3=18px, p=12px
